name: weather_eval
description: Evaluation dataset for the weather_agent. Tests tool use accuracy and response completeness.

evals.name: current_weather_single_city
evals.description: Agent should call get_weather for a single city

parts.text: What is the weather in Paris?

conversation.reference: Agent must call get_weather with city='Paris' and return temperature and conditions.

evals.name: forecast_request
evals.description: Agent should call get_forecast when asked for a forecast

parts.text: What's the 5-day forecast for New York?

conversation.reference: Agent must call get_forecast with city='New York' and days=5.

evals.name: temperature_units
evals.description: Response should include both Celsius and Fahrenheit

conversation.reference: Response must include temperature in both °C and °F as per agent instructions.
